ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the study */,
  "pregnancies" INTEGER /* Number of times the patient has been pregnant */,
  "glucose" INTEGER /* Glucose level of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "skin_thickness" INTEGER /* Skin thickness of the patient */,
  "outcome" INTEGER /* Outcome of the study (e.g., 1 for positive, 0 for negative) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the medical condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the test */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "treatment_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the study */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the patient */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* JSON representation of the patient data at a particular point in time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
